SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_STRAIGHT_PIN.title: Straight Pin
SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_THREEFOLD_PIN.title: Threefold Pin
SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_STING_SHARD.title: Sting Shard
SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_STING_SHARD.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, and deal {Cards:diff()} damage to other enemies.
SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_TACKS.title: Tacks
SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_TACKS.description: Randomly cause {Cards:diff()} enemies to lose {Damage:diff()} HP at the end of turn.
SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_LONG_PIN.title: Long Pin
SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_LONG_PIN.description: Remove all [gold]Block[/gold] from the enemy, then deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_CURVECLAW.title: Curved Claw
SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_CURVESICKLE.title: Curved Sickle
SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_PIMPILLO.title: Pimpillo
SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_PIMPILLO.description: Apply {Cards:diff()} stacks of [gold]Ignite[/gold] to all enemies.
SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_THROWING_RING.title: Throwing Ring
SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_THROWING_RING.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deal an additional instance of damage for each enemy alive.
SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_COGWORK_WHEEL.title: Cogwork Wheel
SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_COGWORK_WHEEL.descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. Repeat this effect for each enemy killed.
SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_DELVER_DRILL.title: Delver Drill
SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_DELVER_DRILL.descrip: If the enemy's intent is not an attack, deal [blue]24[/blue] damage and [gold]Stun[/gold] the enemy.
SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_CONCHCUTTER.title: Conch Cutter
SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_ROSARY_CANNON.title: Rosary Cannon
SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_ROSARY_CANNON.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Lose 6 [gold]Gold[/gold].
Damage dealt is increased by 30% of current [gold]Gold[/gold].
SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_VOLT_VESSELS.title: Volt Vessels
SILKSONGRELICS-TOOL_VOLT_VESSELS.descrip: Randomly cause enemies to lose {Damage:diff()} HP {Cards:diff()} times.
